name: Integrity
description: All links and section references resolve. No unintended dead ends. Codeword/state effects don't create contradictions downstream. Only intentional terminals are permitted.

rubric.instructions: Evaluate whether this content maintains structural integrity. Check that all references resolve and there are no unintended dead ends.

criteria.name: reference_resolution
criteria.description: Every choice leads somewhere. All referenced sections exist or are clearly planned.

good: All choices have valid target anchors

criteria.name: terminal_intentionality
criteria.description: Dead ends are marked clearly as 'The End' or equivalent. No accidental terminals.

bad: Section ends abruptly with no choices

criteria.name: state_consistency
criteria.description: State changes don't create downstream contradictions or paradoxes.

good: State effects are consistent across branches
bad: Player can both have and not have an item

failure_guidance: Fix dangling links by creating the target section or retargeting the choice. Add return paths for forgotten loops or mark sections as intentional terminals. Resolve state contradictions by adjusting conditions or adding fail-forward beats.
